case_title: ALTURA ST. MICHAEL EWERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-08-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND JOE MONROE'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS CLAIMS DO NOT ADEQUATELY ALLEGE CAUSES OF ACTION AND MR. EWER IS GIVEN THIRTY DAYS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT. COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT REFLECTS THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Altura Ewers telephone number 917-564-5221 in Propria Persona.
Hunter Sims III of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-4259 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Joe Monroe's motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint is off calendar in light of the ruling on their demurrer to the complaint.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Altura Ewers telephone number 917-564-5221 in Propria Persona.
Hunter Sims III of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-4259 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

The Court explained the matter and procedures/rules to Mr. Ewers. The Court modified its tentative ruling. Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Joe Monroe's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with thirty days leave to amend. Plaintiffs claims do not adequately allege causes of action and Mr. Ewer is given thirty days to amend the complaint. Counsel is to prepare a form of order that reflects the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
